weapons.name: Deepmare’s Fangs, Talons and Lashing Tails

abilities.name: Raiders' Resolve
abilities.flavor: The Akhelian King orders the warriors under their command to stand firm in the face of the enemy.
abilities.declare: Pick another friendly unit wholly within this unit’s combat range to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to save rolls for the target until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Wave Rider
abilities.flavor: When an Akhelian King charges the foe, they hit with the power of a crashing wave.
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: Strike On The Move
abilities.flavor: Namarti Reavers are experts at running out from cover to unleash a hail of deadly arrows.
abilities.effect: This unit can use SHOOT abilities even if it used a RUN or RETREAT ability in the same turn.

abilities.name: Biovoltaic Blast
abilities.flavor: The biovoltaic energy produced by Fangmora Eels is stored by Morrsarr Guard, ready to be discharged as a bolt of force when the time is right.
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target, then roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in this unit.
abilities.effect: For each 4-5, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. For each 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Add 1 to each roll if there are more models in the target unit than this unit.

abilities.name: Biovoltaic Blast
abilities.flavor: The biovoltaic energy produced by Fangmora Eels is stored by Morrsarr Guard, ready to be discharged as a bolt of force when the time is right.
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target, then roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in this unit.
abilities.effect: For each 4-5, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. For each 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Add 1 to each roll if there are more models in the target unit than this unit.

abilities.name: Biovoltaic Barrier
abilities.flavor: The biovoltaic energy produced by Fangmora Eels is channelled by Ishlaen Guard into a crackling luminescent energy field that protects them from harm.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target unit’s weapons for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: Royal Imperative
battleTraits.summary: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the battle round: Into Them!: Friendly units have STRIKE-FIRST
battleTraits.effect: Pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the battle round: Into Them!: Friendly units have STRIKE-FIRST . Strike Sure: Friendly units’ melee weapons have Crit (Mortal) .
